headline: Agentic developer tooling led the month while Anthropic faced legal and political pressure from multiple directions.
body: Developer tooling and agentic workflows dominated the window, with Claude Code integrations reaching Visual Studio through native diff and accept/reject controls, and Tencent's WorkBuddy shipping a multi-agent desktop assistant with 100+ domain experts and connectors to GitHub, Jira, and Slack. AI safety surfaced repeatedly: the Fable jailbreak was characterized as working as intended for cyberdefense, Sundar Pichai faced protests over Google's defense ties, and the White House escalated its opposition to Anthropic, which is also being sued over Claude Max subscription limit claims. On infrastructure, Microsoft turned to AWS to absorb a GitHub AI capacity crunch. New entrants including knowledge graphs, same-origin policy, iframe sandbox, and Gaussian splatting appeared as fresh technique threads.

cited_items.title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
Microsoft turns to AWS as GitHub faces AI capacity crunch
Anthropic Sued over Alleged False Advertising on Claude Max Subscription Limits
The White House Is Ratcheting Up Its War Against Anthropic
Sundar Pichai faces boos, walkout at Stanford graduation ceremony over Google’s Israel, ICE ties
